title: Privacy-Aware Agent Collaboration for Dynamic VR Slice Management in 6G SD-RAN
abstract: arXiv:2606.26123v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Ultra-low latency and high throughput are required for Virtual Reality (VR) services in 6G networks, which presents critical challenges for Software-Defined Radio Access Networks (SD-RANs) dynamic resource management. This work propose a mobility-driven, privacy-aware Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) framework for VR slice management, in which cooperative agents maximize resource distribution over end-to-end VR links while protecting the privacy of user data. Our approach incorporates mobility prediction and an information bottleneck encoder to facilitate effective and secure agent collaboration. In simulations, comparisons with traditional methods are studied which show up to 34\% throughput improvement, 28\% fewer resources, and 85\% less privacy leakage, guaranteeing dependable immersive VR experiences in future 6G environments.

Title: Privacy-Aware Agent Collaboration for Dynamic VR Slice Management in 6G SD-RAN
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26123v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Ultra-low latency and high throughput are required for Virtual Reality (VR) services in 6G networks, which presents critical challenges for Software-Defined Radio Access Networks (SD-RANs) dynamic resource management. This work propose a mobility-driven, privacy-aware Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) framework for VR slice management, in which cooperative agents maximize resource distribution over end-to-end VR links while protecting the privacy of user data. Our approach incorporates mobility prediction and an information bottleneck encoder to facilitate effective and secure agent collaboration. In simulations, comparisons with traditional methods are studied which show up to 34\% throughput improvement, 28\% fewer resources, and 85\% less privacy leakage, guaranteeing dependable immersive VR experiences in future 6G environments.
translated_title: 面向6G SD-RAN中动态VR切片管理的隐私感知智能体协作
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26123v1 公告类型: 交叉 摘要: 6G网络中的虚拟现实（VR）服务需要超低延迟和高吞吐量，这对软件定义无线接入网（SD-RAN）的动态资源管理提出了严峻挑战。本文提出了一种基于移动性驱动、隐私感知的多智能体强化学习（MARL）框架，用于VR切片管理，其中协作智能体在保护用户数据隐私的同时，最大化端到端VR链路上的资源分配。我们的方法结合了移动性预测和信息瓶颈编码器，以促进高效且安全的智能体协作。仿真中，与传统方法的比较显示，吞吐量提升高达34%，资源消耗减少28%，隐私泄露减少85%，从而在未来的6G环境中保证了可靠的沉浸式VR体验。
tldr: 本文提出了一种隐私感知的多智能体强化学习框架，通过结合移动性预测和信息瓶颈编码器，在保护用户隐私的同时大幅提升VR切片管理的资源效率和吞吐量。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes a privacy-aware multi-agent reinforcement learning framework that integrates mobility prediction and an information bottleneck encoder to significantly improve resource efficiency and throughput for VR slice management while protecting user privacy.
